change_impacts_required_stage_check.name: change_impacts_required_stage_check
change_impacts_required_stage_check.value: required_stage IS NULL OR required_stage IN ('interview','outcome','decision','scope','report')

changes_confirmed_check.name: changes_confirmed_check
changes_confirmed_check.value: status <> 'confirmed' OR (confirmed_by IS NOT NULL AND confirmed_at IS NOT NULL)

changes_withdrawn_check.name: changes_withdrawn_check
changes_withdrawn_check.value: status <> 'withdrawn' OR (withdrawn_by IS NOT NULL AND withdrawn_at IS NOT NULL AND withdrawal_reason IS NOT NULL)

conflict_options_reversibility_check.name: conflict_options_reversibility_check
conflict_options_reversibility_check.value: reversibility IS NULL OR reversibility IN ('high','medium','low')

future_scenarios_probability_class_check.name: future_scenarios_probability_class_check
future_scenarios_probability_class_check.value: probability_class IS NULL OR probability_class IN ('low','medium','high','unknown')

outcomes_horizon_check.name: outcomes_horizon_check
outcomes_horizon_check.value: horizon IS NULL OR horizon IN ('now','next','later','watch')

requirements_horizon_check.name: requirements_horizon_check
requirements_horizon_check.value: horizon IS NULL OR horizon IN ('now','next','later','watch')

requirements_migration_strategy_check.name: requirements_migration_strategy_check
requirements_migration_strategy_check.value: migration_strategy IS NULL OR migration_strategy IN ('coexist','transform','replace','retire')

requirements_reversibility_check.name: requirements_reversibility_check
requirements_reversibility_check.value: reversibility IS NULL OR reversibility IN ('high','medium','low')

requirements_valid_until_check.name: requirements_valid_until_check
requirements_valid_until_check.value: valid_until IS NULL OR valid_from IS NULL OR valid_until >= valid_from

verification_artifacts_evidence_xor.name: verification_artifacts_evidence_xor
verification_artifacts_evidence_xor.value: source_id IS NOT NULL OR artifact_path IS NOT NULL OR result IS NOT NULL

agreement_consents_actor_xor.name: agreement_consents_actor_xor
agreement_consents_actor_xor.value:
(actor_kind='user' AND user_id IS NOT NULL AND guest_session_id IS NULL)
        OR (actor_kind='guest' AND user_id IS NULL AND guest_session_id IS NOT NULL)

project_intakes_supersede_version_check.name: project_intakes_supersede_version_check
project_intakes_supersede_version_check.value:
(intake_version = 1 AND supersedes_intake_id IS NULL)
        OR (intake_version > 1 AND supersedes_intake_id IS NOT NULL)

project_intakes_source_ids_xor.name: project_intakes_source_ids_xor
project_intakes_source_ids_xor.value:
(source_quick_session_id IS NULL AND source_brief_version_id IS NULL)
        OR (source_quick_session_id IS NOT NULL AND source_brief_version_id IS NOT NULL)

project_intakes_source_hashes_xor.name: project_intakes_source_hashes_xor
project_intakes_source_hashes_xor.value:
(source_quick_session_hash IS NULL AND source_brief_snapshot_hash IS NULL)
        OR (source_quick_session_hash IS NOT NULL AND source_brief_snapshot_hash IS NOT NULL)

project_intakes_source_id_hash_link.name: project_intakes_source_id_hash_link
project_intakes_source_id_hash_link.value: source_quick_session_id IS NULL OR source_quick_session_hash IS NOT NULL

quick_sessions_owner_xor.name: quick_sessions_owner_xor
quick_sessions_owner_xor.value:
(guest_session_id IS NOT NULL AND user_id IS NULL)
        OR (guest_session_id IS NULL AND user_id IS NOT NULL)

quick_sessions_origin_check.name: quick_sessions_origin_check
quick_sessions_origin_check.value: origin_guest_session_id IS NULL OR origin_guest_session_id = guest_session_id OR user_id IS NOT NULL

upgrade_records_status_target_xor.name: upgrade_records_status_target_xor
upgrade_records_status_target_xor.value:
(status='succeeded' AND target_project_id IS NOT NULL)
        OR (status IN ('started','failed') AND target_project_id IS NULL)

review_actions_gate_check.name: review_actions_gate_check
review_actions_gate_check.value: gate IS NULL OR gate IN ('outcome','evidence_conflict','scope','domain_profile','report_release')

ai_jobs_cancelled_by_kind_check.name: ai_jobs_cancelled_by_kind_check
ai_jobs_cancelled_by_kind_check.value: cancelled_by_kind IS NULL OR cancelled_by_kind IN ('user','guest','system')

ai_jobs_scope_xor.name: ai_jobs_scope_xor
ai_jobs_scope_xor.value:
(scope_kind='formal_project' AND project_id IS NOT NULL AND quick_session_id IS NULL AND training_attempt_id IS NULL)
        OR (scope_kind='quick_session' AND project_id IS NULL AND quick_session_id IS NOT NULL AND training_attempt_id IS NULL)
        OR (scope_kind='training_attempt' AND project_id IS NULL AND quick_session_id IS NULL AND training_attempt_id IS NOT NULL)

ai_jobs_created_by_xor.name: ai_jobs_created_by_xor
ai_jobs_created_by_xor.value:
(created_by_kind='user' AND created_by_user_id IS NOT NULL AND created_by_guest_session_id IS NULL)
        OR (created_by_kind='guest' AND created_by_user_id IS NULL AND created_by_guest_session_id IS NOT NULL)

ai_jobs_cancelled_by_xor.name: ai_jobs_cancelled_by_xor
ai_jobs_cancelled_by_xor.value:
(cancelled_by_kind IS NULL AND cancelled_by_user_id IS NULL AND cancelled_by_guest_session_id IS NULL AND cancelled_at IS NULL)
        OR (cancelled_by_kind='user' AND cancelled_by_user_id IS NOT NULL AND cancelled_by_guest_session_id IS NULL AND cancelled_at IS NOT NULL)
        OR (cancelled_by_kind='guest' AND cancelled_by_user_id IS NULL AND cancelled_by_guest_session_id IS NOT NULL AND cancelled_at IS NOT NULL)
        OR (cancelled_by_kind='system' AND cancelled_by_user_id IS NULL AND cancelled_by_guest_session_id IS NULL AND cancelled_at IS NOT NULL)

ai_runs_domain_profile_xor.name: ai_runs_domain_profile_xor
ai_runs_domain_profile_xor.value:
(domain_profile_id IS NULL AND domain_profile_version IS NULL)
        OR (domain_profile_id IS NOT NULL AND domain_profile_version IS NOT NULL)

training_attempts_owner_xor.name: training_attempts_owner_xor
training_attempts_owner_xor.value:
(user_id IS NOT NULL AND guest_session_id IS NULL)
        OR (user_id IS NULL AND guest_session_id IS NOT NULL)
